# Sink file does not exist beforehand; tool creates it (and its directory)
# with matching package. Copy targets another directory; same-directory
# splits use -move.
exec sflit -source a.go -sink sub/b.go -regex '^Foo'
exists sub/b.go
cmp sub/b.go expected_b.go

exec gotypecheck a.go
exec gotypecheck sub/b.go
-- a.go --
package mypkg

func Foo() {}
-- expected_b.go --
package mypkg

func Foo() {}
